app_legalese: © 2026 PureLive Open-Source Project. This program is a pure local client application that directly requests the official public APIs of media platforms. The project itself does not store, host, reproduce, or distribute any audio/video resources. The login and cloud synchronization features are powered by Firebase, a third-party infrastructure service provider. The developer solemnly pledges that this application does not collect, process, or retain any user personal data or privacy information. All operational parameters, local configurations, and synchronized metadata are exclusively retained and controlled by the end-user. Users shall assume all legal responsibilities arising from the use of this testing tool.

toolbox_support_content:
Supported link formats:

Bilibili:
https://live.bilibili.com/xxxxx
https://www.bilibili.com/xxxxx
https://b23.tv/xxxxx

Huya:
https://www.huya.com/xxxxx

Douyu:
https://www.douyu.com/xxxxx

Douyin Live/Video:
https://live.douyin.com/xxxxx
https://www.douyin.com/xxxxx
https://v.douyin.com/xxxxx
https://webcast.amemv.com/douyin/webcast/reflow/xxxxx

Kuaishou Live:
https://live.kuaishou.com/u/xxxxx
https://live.kuaishou.cn/u/xxxxx

NetEase CC:
https://cc.163.com/xxxxx
